title: RedPlanetHQ/core
abstract: Your Personal AI OS. A unified platform that brings together AI models, tools, and agents into a single, cohesive operating system for your digital life. Features agent orchestration, memory management, and multi-model support.
abstract_zh: 你的个人AI操作系统，RedPlanetHQ/core，就像给你的数字生活打包了个超级大礼包！各种AI模型、工具和代理统一管理，还自带“魔力”编排师，帮你整理记忆，多模支持，让你的生活像开了外挂一样顺滑。别眨眼，不然你就跟不上这个速度了！
